recentArticles.title: walt disco Announce New Self-Titled Album - clashmusic.com
recentArticles.snippet: # walt disco Announce New Self-Titled Album. New single 'Lies' is out now... Glamorous Glaswegian indie-dance crew **walt disco** will release a self-titled album later this year. The band’s debut album ‘Unlearning’ landed in 2022, scoring rave reviews and scooping a nomination for Best Independent Album at the AIM Awards. New album ‘walt disco’ is a call to arms statement, a record some four years in the making. Out on October 2nd via their new home EMI North, you can catch walt disco at Songs Of Solidarity in Glasgow Art School on September 5th. New single ‘Lies’ is out now – precocious, dynamic, and utterly thrilling, it’s walt disco at their most thrilling, brash, and infectious. recentArticles.title: Rising P-pop group DNA celebrates individuality in self-titled debut album - ABS-CBN Corporate
recentArticles.snippet: Rising P-pop group DNA celebrates individuality in self-titled debut album. Promising Kapamilya P-pop group DNA puts self-expression and resilience at the forefront in their newly dropped self-titled debut album under ABS-CBN’s StarPop label. The album features eight  tracks, “DNA,” “Don’t Ask Me Why,” “Spider,” “Speeding Ticket,” “Lessons,” “BINGO,” “Glow Up Diary,” and “Gala To The Max” with all of the members contributing to conceptualizing and writing the tracks. The group followed it up with the bright, feel-good single “BINGO” and later lent their voices to the official SM Supermalls’ summer anthem, “Gala To The Max,” further showcasing their versatility and credibility as performers. Listen to DNA’s self-titled debut album available on all digital streaming platforms. Maymay announces new single “What We Love”ABS-CBN MusicStarPop. recentArticles.title: Senate Panel Advances Jay Clayton as Next Spy Chief on Party-Line Vote - The New York Times
recentArticles.snippet: Politics|Senate Panel Advances Jay Clayton as Next Spy Chief on Party-Line Vote. # Senate Panel Advances Jay Clayton as Next Spy Chief on Party-Line Vote. Assuming he is confirmed by the full Senate as expected, Mr. Clayton will take command of the Office of National Intelligence from Bill Pulte, a housing official with little national security experience. The Senate Intelligence Committee on Tuesday approved Jay Clayton as President Trump’s pick to oversee the U.S. intelligence community, clearing a key hurdle that may install Mr. Clayton in the job by the end of the week despite evaporating support from Democrats. Assuming he is confirmed by the full Senate as expected, Mr. Clayton will take command of the Office of National Intelligence from Bill Pulte, a housing official who has pursued campaigns of retribution against the president’s perceived enemies.

recentArticles.title: Mick Jagger makes surprise Napa appearance at Rolling Stones ballet gala - San Francisco Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: # Mick Jagger makes surprise Napa appearance at Rolling Stones ballet gala. Mick Jagger attended a Napa Valley dance gala Friday as his partner, former American Ballet Theatre dancer Melanie Hamrick, presented a program that paired classical ballet with the music of the Rolling Stones. “A Night at the Ballet,” performed Friday, July 17, was part of Festival Napa Valley’s 20th-anniversary summer season. Hamrick produced the program with Joanna DeFelice and Christine Shevchenko at Charles Krug in St. Helena. The contemporary work is set to the Rolling Stones song from the band’s 1971 album “Sticky Fingers.”. Friday’s gala was among the final events of Festival Napa Valley’s anniversary season, which began July 4 and has featured Renée Fleming, Wynton Marsalis, Ray Chen, Jean-Yves Thibaudet and Time for Three. The festival continues Saturday with the world premiere of “The Judgment of Paris,” a one-act opera by composer Jake Heggie and librettist Gene Scheer. Aidin Vaziri is a staff writer and pop music critic at the San Francisco Chronicle.
recentArticles.summary: 新聞報導了Mick Jagger出席其伴侶Melanie Hamrick在納帕谷舉辦的滾石樂隊芭蕾舞晚會，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.snippet: # Gisele Bündchen Shares Rare Photos of Her, Joaquim Valente’s Son on Lavish Family Vacation. Gisele Bündchen shared adorable new photos of her and Joaquim Valente’s 16-month-old-son while enjoying a family vacation in Tahiti. Watch: Gisele Bündchen Praises Husband Joaquim Valente in Father's Day Tribute, Excludes Tom Brady. The supermodel shared rare snaps of her and husband **Joaquim Valente**’s 16-month-old son as they enjoyed a tropical family vacation in Tahiti. While the 45-year-old looked out at the view of the ocean, her little guy—wearing cream trunks—took in the view of the water below them. After all, Bündchen—also mom to **Benjamin**, 16, and **Vivian**, 13, with ex-husband **Tom Brady**—shared a snap of her eldest kids as they looked out over the breathtaking views of the island. “Happy Father’s Day @joaquimvalente!” Bündchen—who tied the knot with Valente in December 2025—captioned a June 21 Instagram post featuring family photos with Valente. recentArticles.title: Japanese R&B Artist Nao Yoshioka Embraces Vulnerability On New Album self - Respect My Region
recentArticles.snippet: Japanese R&B and soul artist **Nao Yoshioka** is opening a deeply personal new chapter with the release of her latest album, ***self***. The 12 track album explores identity, healing, and self acceptance while bringing together collaborators from around the world to create one of the **most intimate releases of her career.**. The album reflects different stages of her personal journey, allowing each song to contribute to a larger story of growth and emotional honesty. **Yoshioka** describes the album as a reflection of finally accepting both her strengths and insecurities while expressing gratitude for the people who helped shape her journey. While ***self*** is rooted in Yoshioka’s personal story, the album’s sound is strengthened by an impressive lineup of international collaborators. The release of ***self*** is only part of what promises to be an active year for Yoshioka. With ***self*** now available, listeners can experience **Nao Yoshioka’s** most personal work to date while exploring an album that celebrates vulnerability, growth, and the power of embracing every part of who you are.
recentArticles.summary: 日本R&B歌手Nao Yoshioka發行了新專輯《self》，探索身份、療癒和自我接納，並與國際音樂人合作。

recentArticles.title: Chanel signs singer Gracie Abrams as Coco Mademoiselle Ambassador - Cosmetics Business
recentArticles.snippet: # Chanel signs singer Gracie Abrams as Coco Mademoiselle Ambassador. Chanel has named the 26-year-old Grammy-nominated artist the face of Coco Mademoiselle Crush Absolu – the first new scent addition to its Coco Mademoiselle fragrance collection in six years. Chanel has named singer Gracie Abrams the face of its new fragrance Coco Mademoiselle Crush Absolu. The Grammy-nominated artist will front the newest scent addition to the luxury house’s Coco Mademoiselle collection via a new campaign. Set to launch in August, Coco Mademoiselle Crush Absolu is the first new addition to Chanel’s Coco Mademoiselle fragrance franchise in six years. Abrams is a 26-year-old singer-songwriter known for hits such as ‘I miss you, I’m sorry’, ‘That’s so true’ and ‘Hit the wall’. *Chanel's Coco Mademoiselle Crush Absolu*. Commenting on the partnership, Abrams said "it is unreal” to be the new face of Coco Mademoiselle. Abrams follows in the footsteps of actress Whitney Peak, who was named the face of Coco Mademoiselle in 2023 – Chanel’s first-ever black fragrance ambassador.

recentArticles.title: Ed Sheeran broke this Bay Area stadium’s attendance record. He’s coming back for another show - San Francisco Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: # Ed Sheeran broke this Bay Area stadium’s attendance record. The last time Ed Sheeran came to Levi’s Stadium in 2023, he broke the venue’s attendance record. That distinction makes the “Shape of You” singer a fitting act to mark the stadium’s return to its former self. San Francisco Bay Area Stadium, as the venue was temporarily known during its month-long FIFA World Cup hosting stint, went viral when a white tarp covered the Levi’s logo in response to FIFA’s branding restrictions. Sheeran will be the first to perform at the venue since the tarp was removed July 7. He continues to ride the waves of his eighth studio album “Play,” which includes the electropop track “Azizam” and the pop-R&B song “A Little More.”. The four-time Grammy winner brings the Loop Tour to the Bay Area on Saturday, July 25. Desiree Luo is a Datebook intern at the San Francisco Chronicle covering arts and entertainment news. A Bay Area native, Desiree is an avid fan of the Giants, Warriors and 49ers.
recentArticles.summary: Ed Sheeran broke this Bay Area stadium’s attendance record. He’s coming back for another show - San Francisco Chronicle

recentArticles.title: Bruno Mars brings hits, romance and a Paddington Bear to Wembley - BBC
recentArticles.snippet: # Bruno Mars has an unexpected opening before Wembley party starts. Bruno Mars appeared determined to lift the nation's mood during the first of his six nights at Wembley Stadium. ## 'London, it's time to party'. The show began with a pre-recorded video of Mars praying in a church for a good performance, before he emerged beneath visuals of a stained-glass window in a red suit bejewelled with roses. But for those who had avoided spoilers, Risk It All, a slow R&B ballad from Mars' latest album, The Romantic, was perhaps an unexpected opener. It was an early glimpse of what was to come as he declared: "London, it's time to party.". For his 2010 hit Just the Way You Are, the singer asked for the stadium lights to be turned up so he could see the crowd, revealing thousands of fans singing every word back to him, before Uptown Funk transformed Wembley into a giant dancefloor complete with fireworks and gold confetti.
recentArticles.summary: Bruno Mars brings hits, romance and a Paddington Bear to Wembley - BBC

recentArticles.title: Joe Jackson Makes A New York City Homecoming At Beacon Theatre Show - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: Joe Jackson concluded the North American leg of his \*Hope and Fury\* tour at New York City's Beacon Theatre, offering a nearly two-hour journey through his almost 50-year career. The veteran singer-songwriter, a long-time NYC resident, masterfully wove new tracks from his latest album, a return to rock and pop, with early New Wave hits like "Is She Going Out With Him?" and "Steppin' Out." Accompanied by his superb band, Jackson's performance highlighted his diverse musical styles—from jazz to Latin—all infused with a distinct New York flavor. For the encore, Jackson and the band returned to pay tribute to David Bowie, another British music legend and one-time New York resident, with an urgent cover of “Scary Monsters (and Super Creeps).” That was followed by the jazzy “You Can’t Get What You Want (Till What You Know Want)," and Jackson concluded the night alone on stage with a soulful and heartfelt performance of “Home Town.”.
recentArticles.summary: Joe Jackson Makes A New York City Homecoming At Beacon Theatre Show - Forbes

recentArticles.title: Your guide to the CAAMP concert at CMAC this week - Democrat and Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: # Your guide to the CAAMP concert at CMAC this week. CAAMP, whose fifth studio album, "Copper Changes Color," debuted at No.1 on Billboard's Americana/Folk Albums chart, will take the CMAC stage at 7 p.m. on Tuesday, July 21, for their "CAAMP Live in 2026 Tour.". CAAMP will be CMAC's ninth show of the 2026 summer concert season. Tickets for CAAMP's July 21 show currently range from around $52 to $104, and can be purchased through Ticketmaster.com. Doors for the show will open at 5:30 p.m., and the performance will start at 7 p.m. The venue is on the Finger Lakes Community College campus, located at 3355 Marvin Sands Drive, Hopewell. **Premium lot parking:** Tickets for the premium parking lot are $30 and must be purchased in advance through Ticketmaster.com. For more information on parking and to stay updated on lot closures, visit cmacevents.com/cmac-venue/. Here is the remaining 2026 summer concert lineup at CMAC:.
recentArticles.summary: Your guide to the CAAMP concert at CMAC this week - Democrat and Chronicle

recentArticles.snippet: # Heath Jornales's self-titled EP reaches No. 1 on iTunes PH Albums chart. Heath Jornales recently dropped his self-titled EP, which has six tracks. Sparkle star Heath Jornales achieved another career milestone as his self-titled extended play (EP) reached number one on the iTunes Philippines Albums Chart. The *You're My Favorite Song* lead actor officially released his first EP, *Heath Jornales*, on July 17 and was met with much love. Sparkle GMA Artist Center announced on Friday that the record had topped the iTunes Philippines Albums Chart. “Heath Jornales' self-titled EP has officially reached #1 on iTunes PH Albums, and he's trending on Apple Music!” Sparkle wrote in an Instagram post. > A post shared by Sparkle GMA Artist Center (@sparklegmaartistcenter). Last June, Heath hit 1 million streams for his debut single, “Back to You.” which he marked with an Instagram post. > A post shared by Heath Jornales (@heathjornales).

recentArticles.title: Oasis singer Liam Gallagher’s son is bringing his band to San Francisco - San Francisco Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: # Oasis singer Liam Gallagher’s son is bringing his band to San Francisco. Gene Gallagher, the son of Oasis singer Liam Gallagher, is following his father’s path to San Francisco — but with a heavier sound and a considerably smaller stage. Gallagher’s British rock trio, Villanelle, is scheduled to make its San Francisco debut Wednesday, July 29, at Rickshaw Stop as part of Popscene, the city’s long-running showcase for emerging British and alternative acts. The performance comes nearly 32 years after Oasis made its own San Francisco debut at Bottom of the Hill on Sept. “It’s wild to think that I saw Oasis make their San Francisco debut at Bottom Of The Hill in 1994 and now, 32 years later, I have the opportunity to bring Liam Gallagher’s son’s band Villanelle to the Bay Area for their debut as well,” Axelsen said. Aidin Vaziri is a staff writer and pop music critic at the San Francisco Chronicle.

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z Proved He Is Still The King Of New York, And The Numbers Back It Up - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: # Jay-Z Proved He Is Still The King Of New York, And The Numbers Back It Up. Forbes contributors publish independent expert analyses and insights. Jay-Z's "JAŸ-Z30" celebration cemented his "King of New York" status, transforming the city into a living tribute to his 30-year legacy. The month-long activation featured a Dumbo exhibit, wrapped subway trains, and an immersive museum, culminating in a record-shattering three-night residency at Yankee Stadium. What began on June 24th as an exhibit dedicated to“JAŸ-Z30” in Brooklyn's Dumbo neighborhood unfolded into a sweeping look at the cultural icon’s journey and legacy across music, fashion, and literature over the past three decades. That tribute for the 30th anniversary of *Reasonable Doubt* became one of the largest artist-driven cultural activations New York has seen in years, culminating in a three-night residency at Yankee Stadium that shattered attendance records and reinforced Jay-Z’s status as the defining artist of New York.

recentArticles.title: Trump's intelligence nominee refuses to say who won 2020 election - PBS
recentArticles.snippet: # Trump's intelligence nominee refuses to say who won 2020 election. Jay Clayton appeared before the Senate Intelligence Committee for his confirmation hearing to become director of national intelligence. The job is largely focused on foreign threats and national security, but much of the hearing focused instead on the recent past. U.S. attorney Jay Clayton appeared before the Senate Intelligence Committee for his confirmation hearing to become director of national intelligence. Today on Capitol Hill, a hearing that was supposed to be about the future of the intelligence community was instead dominated by the history of the 2020 election. Jay Clayton, U.S. Director of National Intelligence Nominee: I'm not going to do this with you. Jay Clayton is the president's nominee for director of national intelligence, a lawyer with more than 30 years of experience, President Trump's first chairman of the Securities and Exchange Commission, and most recently U.S. attorney for the Southern District of New York, one of the Justice Department's most prestigious roles.

recentArticles.title: Beyoncé Shaved Off Jay-Z’s Afro at Yankee Stadium - GQ
recentArticles.snippet: # Beyoncé Shaved Off Jay-Z’s Afro at Yankee Stadium. For his three-night stadium run in the Bronx, Jay-Z returned to his roots in more ways than one. In it, Jay is wearing a black-and-white 1996 World Series Yankees jersey, black pants, and Adidas Superstars, sitting in the exact same stadium seats that had sold out for his shows. After wearing freeform locs for nearly a decade, Jay made headlines in June 2026 when he returned to the stage for the first time in seven years to perform at Roots Picnic in Philadelphia, showing off a fresh new afro. A video posted to the YouTube channel of Beyoncé’s haircare brand Cecréd later showed that she and Jay’s daughter Blue pitched in to help comb out the rapper’s hair, too. The crew cut reveal added even more gravitas to Jay’s momentous homecoming, a return to the shorter hairstyle he had in the ‘90s when he was still coming up in the Brooklyn rap game.

recentArticles.snippet: # Paris Jackson's Legal War With Michael's Estate Rages On After Her Recent Court Win. ## Michael Jackson Estate Legal War With Paris Jackson Rages On. **Paris Jackson** and the executor of her late father **Michael Jackson**'s estate are duking it out in court again … beefing over sealing documents in their never-ending legal battle. In newly filed court docs, obtained by TMZ, Paris slams **John Branca**'s request to seal certain documents related to her objections to his request for payment of fees. According to the docs, Paris has also suggested the MJ estate remains open after all these years due to how the executor has been managing things and said she remains largely in the dark about the estate's financial matters ... Paris said John and the recently **deceased** **John McClain** were paid over $120 million for their work on the estate over 13 years … which is a far cry from what she says she and her two brothers have received since their dad died.

recentArticles.title: The ad machine: how David Beckham conquered America - The Guardian
recentArticles.snippet: An Australian TV show has already made a funny clip that notes Beckham is basically the hardest working man in America, furiously retailing every moment of his waking life, from morning coffee, to breakfast pancakes and taking a shower in his pants (he’s 52 years old: here is his arse crack); to shopping for DIY stuff, eating grenade-shaped matter for lunch, having a beer, having smouldering thoughts about his watch, driving really fast, presumably to the bar where he is now having to hastily neck whisky, and then turning into some kind of unspecified sun god before falling asleep finally on a really expensive mattress (you don’t see his arse crack). Do people in the UK really know quite how massive he is now, not just as one of the most famous people in America, but in his reach and power?

Also stream new releases from Helado Tropical and Nia Archives. *With so much good music being released all the time, it can be hard to determine what to listen to first. This week’s batch includes new albums from Steve Lacy, Syd, and more. Subscribe to Pitchfork’s* *New Music Friday newsletter* *to get our recommendations in your inbox every week. Steve Lacy has the ability to channel melancholy, longing, and the first flush of young love through his guitar. “She’s just a nice Irish Catholic lady, living in her castle with her cats and her dogs and her piano.”) But although Enya’s name makes up half of *Caribenya*’s portmanteau title, this is far from a tribute record: it’s a synthesis of the many elements—from dembow to cumbia to classical composition—that the Toronto-based singer and multi-instrumentalist has incorporated into her practice over the years.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇Pitchfork文章推薦了本週發行的11張新專輯，但內容中未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Carly Rae Jepsen, Gracie Abrams, Steve Lacy & More: New Music Friday Guide - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: This week: Gracie Abrams shares her anticipated this album, *Daughter From Hell* (read *Billboard*‘s tracks ranked here); Steve Lacy is back with his self-produced third album, *Oh yeah?*; and Carly Rae Jepsen continues her *Day and Night* rollout with the release of the upcoming double album’s second single… plus much more. Gracie Abrams’ third album is finally here, just two years after *The Secret of Us* helped the pop singer emerge as a fast-rising star as the project debuted at No. 2 Billboard 200, bolstered by hit single “That’s So True.” This time, Abrams returned to producer Aaron Dessner’s Long Pond studio to craft the sonically intimate and lyrically expansive *Daughter From Hell*, led by surging singles “Hit the Wall” and “Look at My Life.” Release day focus track “Good Reason” is softer in its contemplation, as Abrams sings of putting herself first.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Carly Rae Jepsen、Gracie Abrams和Steve Lacy等歌手的新音樂發行，內容未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z’s Hit-Packed Yankee Stadium Shows Turned the Ballpark into a Throne Room - GQ
recentArticles.snippet: On “Addicted to the Game,” a fan-favorite *Blueprint*-era loosie, Jay-Z sums up his career with one of my all-time favorite lines of his: “Thoughts are sporadic, I gotta un-confuse it/Sort of like a Rubik’s Cube is/Every album’s a color, but I fuck up the other color.” With 25-odd years of distance, it’s hilarious that he said this at what we now know as merely the halfway point in his discography; like most of his lines, it now holds a more prophetic weight than maybe even he could’ve imagined. Back in January, staring down the barrel of the 30th anniversary of his career, Jay played coy about how much he’d celebrate this milestone, even as he promised a year defined by “all offense.” Fast forward to July, and here he is in a bulletproof vest, standing before his hometown ready to receive love, but also take on all smoke.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於美國饒舌歌手Jay-Z的演唱會與職業生涯，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z Closes Yankee Stadium Residency With Epic Late Night Show Featuring Beyoncé, Rihanna, Usher, Teyana Taylor and More - Variety Australia
recentArticles.snippet: “We’re going to go until like 5 a.m., so don’t be scared,” said Jay-Z not long after he started the third and final show of his Yankee Stadium residency on Sunday night, the concluding chapter to a weekend that paid homage to the 25th and 30th anniversaries of his seminal albums “The Blueprint” and “Reasonable Doubt,” respectively. The remark was made around 1 a.m, roughly 40 minutes after he started a concert that had been plagued by hours-long delays as fans waited both inside the stadium and on the perimeter of the venue, stuck in lines that didn’t budge. It was a ceaseless tour of his discography accented and enhanced by a rotating cast of guest artists that, to do justice, is best laid out as a plain list: Beyoncé, Rihanna, Usher, Jermaine Dupri, Pharrell Williams, Clipse, Teyana Taylor, Swizz Beatz, Jeezy, Fat Joe, Jadakiss and The-Dream.
recentArticles.summary: Jay-Z Closes Yankee Stadium Residency With Epic Late Night Show Featuring Beyoncé, Rihanna, Usher, Teyana Taylor and More - Variety Australia

latestReport.daily_summary: 周杰倫近期新聞不斷，與昆凌在英國會合網球巨星費德勒，展現跨界好交情。他不僅發聲力挺周星馳新片，也為新專輯《太陽之子》帶來解析，並預告實境節目九月將登華航。儘管杭州演唱會遭質疑「划水」，他仍攜小女兒抵京準備鳥巢演唱會，林志穎也現身支持，顯示其話題與人氣依舊。

recentReports.daily_summary: 周杰倫新專輯《太陽之子》解析曝光，其實境節目也將於九月登上華航機上影音。他不僅力挺周星馳新片，更在英國與網球傳奇費德勒同框，展現跨界好交情。儘管杭州演唱會被質疑「划水」，但他已抱小女兒抵京準備鳥巢演唱會，林志穎也現身支持。

周杰倫近期新聞不斷，新專輯《太陽之子》的解析引發關注，其原名為「我就是光」。此外，他參與的實境節目將於九月在華航機上影音平台獨家上線。在個人動態方面，周杰倫與昆凌飛往英國，與網球巨星費德勒同框，展現跨界好交情。他也公開力挺周星馳新片，透露兩人深厚友誼。儘管杭州演唱會曾遭質疑「划水」，但他仍抱著小女兒抵京準備鳥巢演唱會，兒子也展現獨立一面。林志穎父子也現身周杰倫演唱會，顯示其高人氣。國台辦也對周杰倫等台灣歌手在大陸舉辦演唱會一事做出回應。
今日共搜集 50 篇周杰倫相關新聞。

recentReports.daily_summary: 周杰倫近期話題不斷，鳥巢演唱會前夕，他攜小女兒抵京，兒子展現獨立。然而，杭州演唱會卻引發「划水」質疑。儘管如此，林志穎帶兒子觀看演唱會的溫馨互動獲讚。國台辦也對周杰倫等台灣歌手在大陸辦演唱會做出回應，顯示其影響力。
